title: Baklava
excerpt: Ingredients 2 packs of filo pastry 600 g nuts of your choice 100 g Pistachio nuts 250 ml butter melted 30 ml ground cinnamon 7,5 ml nutmeg zest of 2 lemons zest of 1 orange Mix all the ingredients. Syrup 250 ml water 250 ml sugar juice of 1 lemon 150 ml …
html:
Ingredients

  • 2 packs of filo pastry
  • 600 g nuts of your choice
  • 100 g Pistachio nuts
  • 250 ml butter melted
  • 30 ml ground cinnamon
  • 7,5 ml nutmeg
  • zest of 2 lemons
  • zest of 1 orange
    Mix all the ingredients.

Syrup

  • 250 ml water
  • 250 ml sugar
  • juice of 1 lemon
  • 150 ml honey
  • 1 cinnamon stick

Method

Cook the syrup for 10 minutes and let it cool in the fridge.

Grease a deep dish with butter.

Place 8 layers of filo, buttered in between, on the bottom.

Place a thin layer of the nut mixture on the layers.

Now place 6 layers of filo, buttered, on the nuts.

Now another layer of nuts.

Repeat 5 times and finish with 8 layers of filo.

Brush with butter.

Cut with a sharp knife into diamond shapes.

Bake for 40 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

When it comes out of the oven, pour the cold syrup over it.

Easy!
